response.justification: Candidate has 14+ years of broad full-stack engineering experience with recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, which aligns with parts of the role. However, the resume lacks concrete evidence of shipping production GenAI systems at scale, no explicit RAG/vector database work, no named cloud platform expertise (AWS/GCP/Azure), and no demonstrated customer-facing technical leadership for enterprise GenAI delivery. Worth a screening call to probe depth of AI-agent and cloud experience.
strengths: Long tenure with full-stack TypeScript/Node.js and polyglot engineering background
Recent hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, teaching/mentoring via workshops and talks
concerns: No explicit RAG, vector database, or LLM evaluation/observability experience listed
Minimal evidence of major cloud platform depth (only a brief AWS CDK mention)
No clear customer-facing technical discovery or enterprise delivery leadership experience
